ab: lokah simu kwara’, rasaw simu mcisal ki nnbkis na qalang ni sinsi kira’ ki.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: lawkah simu kwara’, rasaw simu mcisal ki nnbkis na qalang ni sinsi kira’ ki.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。

ab: aw! hala ta’ mcisal na ke’ ’Tayal ki nnbkis.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說泰雅語。
en: B: Okay! We’re going to talk to the seniors in ’Tayal.

ab: aw! hala ta’ mcisal na kay’ ’Tayal ki nnbkis.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說泰雅語。
en: B: Okay! We’re going to talk to the seniors in ’Tayal.

ab: sobih ta’ ptehuk la?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: sawbih ta’ ptayhuk la?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: sobih la.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: sawbih la.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: yutas, nyux sami mwah mita’ isu’ la.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: talagay! baq simu kmal ke’ ’Tayal ga! ta kinblaq!
ch: B:你們會說泰雅語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B:You guys speak Thai! That’s great!

ab: talagay! baq simu kmal kay’ ’Tayal ga! ta kinblaq!
ch: B:你們會說泰雅語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B:You guys speak Thai! That’s great!

ab: lokah simu kwara’, rasun simu ni sinsi mqumah cinbuxan trakis kira’.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: lawkah simu kwara’, rasun ni sinsi mqumah cinbuxan trakis kira’.
ch: A+:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: aw. mhway su’ sinsi.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: ’wah mbku sqani kwara’, aras qeqaya’ mamu.
ch: A+:大家過來這裡排隊，記得帶好你們的工具。
en: A: Everyone come here and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: ’wah maybku sqani kwara’, aras qayqazya’ mamu.
ch: A:大家過來這裡排隊，記得帶好你們的工具。
en: A: Everyone come here and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: aw. sinsi, nyux sami maras qeqaya’ kwara’ myan la.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: aw. sinsi, nyux sami maras qayqazya’ kwara’ myan la.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: tehuk ta’ la?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: tayhuk ta’ la?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: ini’ na’, knwan ta’ na’.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: usa’ rmhkal qsya’ ha.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: aw. hala saku’ rmhkal qsya’.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: usa’ magal pax~pax.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: aw. hala saku’ smosaw pzit.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: aw. hala saku’ smawsaw pzit.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: lokah simu kwara’. mosa’ ta’ mita’ zzngazyan qqsinu kira’.
ch: A+:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: lawkah simu kwara’. mawsa’ ta’ mita’ zzngazyan qqsinu kira’.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: ta kinblaq! phnanu’ ta’ musa’?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: pgluw ta’ basu’.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: inblaq mbku kwara’. pbazi ta’ kipu’ la.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: aw.
en: B: Yes.

ab: mkura’ te gleng ga, qqbhniq, te suru ga, mqmqu’. si usa zmangay sa sozyan mamu ki.
ch: A+:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: mkura’ tay glayng ga, qqbhniq, tay suru ga, mqmqu’. si usa zmangay sa sawzyan mamu ki.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: sinsi, mngungu saku’ mita’ mqu’.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: han, nway! nanu’ si usa’ mita’ qbhniq isu’ la.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: atu’ qutux tmucing lga, ’wah msli’ sqani lki.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: aw. mhway su’ sinsi.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: nanu’ kwara’ wal su’ ktan soni’?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: nanu’ kwara’ wal su’ ktan sawni’?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: pzyux mqu’ wal maku’ ktan, ru pzyux qbhniq uzi.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: ihi’ cikay, mosa’ ta’ la.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: ihi’ cikay, mawsa’ ta’ la.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: naga’ saku’ cikay ha. nyux m’uy kakay maku’.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: msquna ta’ musa’ mlngyaq ku?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: msquna ta’ musa’ mlngyaq ma’?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: aw! cila!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: hbazyaw balay tayal nyux mlngyaq sqani.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: zzik qsya’ nya’ tehasa hiya’ si ta ’lngyaq sqani.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is very deep, so we can swim here.

ab: zzik qsya’ nya’ tayhasa hizya’. si ta ’lngyaq sqani.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
